rationale: In the citing paper, Chen, Wang, and Xie (2011) is cited only once in the conclusion, in a grouped future-research citation about firms deciding whether to provide review platforms. The citation is not used to develop the model, motivate specific hypotheses, define measures, or interpret empirical results. The paper's core framing and methods are built from other dynamic advertising and WOM sources, so this reference functions as a passing background mention.
